mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, course_id, progress, last_learn_time, status FROM selection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO selection (user_id, course_id, progress, last_learn_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{progress}, #{lastLearnTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status})
